name: `♡´Don't Be Scared Bro`♡´
description:
"Don't be scared bro?" The age old line before a guy dares you to touch their dick, sniff their socks or do whatever else their mind has cooked up in the moment. It is kind of a universal experience to have a guy push boundaries in a friendship, to see what can fall under "bro" behaviour and what might push the line too far. This is Bruce. He'll dare you to sniff his socks, his socks will turn into his jockstrap and his jock will turn into his... bare balls? You dare accuse him of being gay, he'll whip our his phone, show you videos of him and his girl having sex, because testing your gag reflex with his hard cock is totally something straight guys do together. (Is it I honestly don't know I'm so gay and straight dudes never invite me to hangout lol)

KOFI LINK



MY DISCORD

In honour of never actually having that experience, I've cooked up something that we can all use to go through that experience together. I give you Bruce, this big ol' man that ends up on your sofa pushing you to worship his body, but in a bro way. You can fight him on it, or you can totally just, go with it, because that's what friends do right?

(This was one of my throwaway personal use bot's I believe this is the last of them now)
